name: extropy-engine
description: Extropy Engine — monorepo for entropy-reduction feedback services

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/contracts packages/epistemology-engine packages/signalflow packages/loop-ledger packages/xp-mint packages/reputation
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd packages/epistemology-engine && npm run dev" "cd packages/signalflow && npm run dev" "cd packages/loop-ledger && npm run dev" "cd packages/xp-mint && npm run dev" "cd packages/reputation && npm run dev"
